headline: Trump Says Iran War Could End Very Soon
summary: President Trump said the war in Iran could end very soon, but warned of dramatic escalation if Iran disrupts oil supplies.

reactions.quote: Trump orders U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, world leaders react, and the Iranian people celebrate. Join live for a full recap of what unfolded, why it matters, and what will happen next.
